ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition entry */,
  "outlook" TEXT /* General outlook (e.g., sunny, overcast, rainy) */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Temperature description (e.g., hot, mild, cool) */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Humidity level (e.g., high, normal) */,
  "windy" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if it is windy */,
  "wind_speed" TEXT /* Specific wind speed (e.g., 10 mph) */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Amount of precipitation (e.g., 0.5 inches) */,
  "cloud_cover" TEXT /* Level of cloud cover (e.g., clear, partly cloudy, overcast) */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility conditions (e.g., 5 miles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the play decision */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather conditions associated with the decision */,
  "play" TEXT /* Outcome of the decision (e.g., yes or no to play) */,
  "decision_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the decision was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision (e.g., safety concerns, field conditions) */,
  "decision_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_decisions_decision_by FOREIGN KEY ("decision_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_decisions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., coach, parent, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number for emergency communications */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home or contact address for additional information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outdoor activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity (e.g., soccer practice) */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Time when the activity is scheduled */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the activity will take place */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., practice, game, tournament) */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport associated with the activity (e.g., soccer, baseball) */,
  "expected_participants" INTEGER /* Expected number of participants for planning purposes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the activity (e.g., scheduled, canceled, postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the participant entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scheduled activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user participating in the activity */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant (e.g., attending, not attending, late) */,
  "attendance_time" TEXT /* Time when the participant attended or is expected to attend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_participants_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the weather log entry */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recorded weather condition */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the weather log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for the weather log entry */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the weather condition was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_logs_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participation_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the participation statistic */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scheduled activity */,
  "participants_count" INTEGER /* Count of participants in the activity */,
  "weather_condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition during the activity */,
  "attendance_rate" REAL /* Percentage of expected participants who actually attended */,
  "weather_impact" TEXT /* Description of how weather impacted the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_stats_weather_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_stats_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity the feedback is related to */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipient user */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity the notification is related to */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., weather update, schedule change, cancellation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, parent, admin) */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* Permission level associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assigned role */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who assigned the role */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
